assertions_verified.evidence: mountLandingView renders both 'Create a new game' and 'Join a game' buttons.
mountCreateGameView renders rounds (1-10), handful (1-10), and display-name inputs.
mountWaitingForOpponentView renders the share code and join URL with Copy buttons that use navigator.clipboard (fallback to execCommand).
mountJoinGameView accepts a prefilledCode argument; section-6's router reads ?join=<code> from URL and passes it. The join input is populated from prefilledCode.

Landing 'How it works' explains share. Waiting view explains share methods. iOS Add-to-Home-Screen instruction renders when notificationStatus().ios_requires_home_screen_install is true. Reveal/in-game notification-enable copy comes from section-4.
createGame() and joinGame() (in state.js) write {uid, displayName, joinedAt} to game.participants; reveal panel and wrap-up in section-4 render displayName from this field.
